creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Created attachment 170946
patch

Changed the size of all boolean flags to single bits.

Humdinger now recognizes the configured hostname with "www."
prepended to it in Referer/Origin headers and in SNI.

Humdinger now recognizes the IPv6 loopback address "::1"
with Server Name Indication and in Referer/Origin header lines.

The drood manual now lists the REMOTE_ADDR variable as set 
for scgi programs because that variable has always been set 
by the server.
